title: Auslegung der heiligen messe [1]
remarks: Cites the Summa Johannis (John of Frieburg) on pg 8, and Innocent on pg. 120. Pg 121: The crosses and Christ's three-fold crucifixion. Begins w/ questions about ordination of priests, consecration of the church. Mode of procedure in commentary section is to give Latin, then a German translation, then a brief description of the priest's actions, and sometimes an allegory attached to an action. Page 117, on the canon: Hic non decet legere, page 183: Hic decet legere. Pg. 31: Cites Bede and sprinkles in Latin text into his German prose.
